hero.sub: Europe's leading spring manufacturer for railway and automotive industries since 1951

helical.name: Helical Springs
helical.desc: Hot-formed springs for railway and automotive industry. Maximum precision and durability for the most demanding applications.
helical.detail: Our helical springs are manufactured from the highest quality steels with strict adherence to all standards. Every spring undergoes thorough quality control.

trapezoidal.name: Trapezoidal Leaf Springs
trapezoidal.desc: Traditional design solution for commercial vehicles and trailers. Proven technology with long service life.
trapezoidal.detail: Trapezoidal leaf springs combine traditional design principles with modern manufacturing processes. Suitable for heavy commercial vehicles.

parabolic.name: Parabolic Leaf Springs
parabolic.desc: Modern lightweight solution with optimal performance. Reduced weight while maintaining maximum load capacity.
parabolic.detail: Parabolic leaf springs represent a modern approach to suspension. Thanks to the optimized cross-section, they achieve lower weight with the same load capacity.

industries.title: Industries
industries.subtitle: Our springs perform in the most demanding conditions

automotive.name: Automotive
automotive.desc: We supply springs for passenger and commercial vehicles to leading manufacturers and their suppliers.

railway.name: Railway
railway.desc: We specialize in springs for rail vehicles — locomotives, wagons and trams.

industrial.name: Industrial
industrial.desc: We manufacture springs for agricultural machinery, industrial machines and other applications.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Seven decades of precision
about.mission: We know how to make quality springs on which the safety of passengers and the weight of cargo depend
about.historyText: HŽP a.s. was founded in 1951 in Prostějov as a specialized spring manufacturer for industry. Over more than 70 years, we have become a recognized supplier to the automotive and railway industries throughout Europe.
about.history2: Today we employ 280 specialists and manufacture nearly 573,000 springs per year. Our products can be found in rail vehicles throughout Europe and in automobiles from leading global brands.
about.visionText: To become the leading European spring manufacturer for the railway industry while expanding capacity in the automotive sector.

values.title: Quality
values.desc: Every spring undergoes strict quality control according to international standards.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We invest in the development of new technologies and manufacturing processes.

values.title: Reliability
values.desc: Our customers can count on us — we deliver on time and to the required quality.

values.title: Sustainability
values.desc: Responsible approach to the environment and efficient use of resources.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here for you
contact.formSuccess: Message sent. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

career.title: Career
career.subtitle: Build your career with us
career.intro: We are looking for talented and motivated people who want to be part of a leading European spring manufacturer. We offer stable employment, a pleasant work environment and opportunities for growth.

benefits.title: Stability
benefits.desc: Over 70 years in business. Stable customers and job security.

benefits.title: Development
benefits.desc: We invest in the education and professional development of our employees.

benefits.title: Compensation
benefits.desc: Competitive salaries, bonuses and benefits beyond statutory requirements.

benefits.title: Team
benefits.desc: A friendly team of 280 professionals. Open company culture.

benefits.title: Location
benefits.desc: Based in Prostějov — an accessible city with a good quality of life.

benefits.title: Technology
benefits.desc: Modern machinery and production technology from world-class manufacturers.

career.noPositions: We currently have no open positions. Send us your CV at hana.horakova@hzp.cz.

meta.products: Helical springs, trapezoidal and parabolic leaf springs for railway and automotive industries. Custom manufacturing with precision certified to international standards.
meta.about: Discover HŽP a.s. — over 70 years of spring manufacturing expertise. 280 employees, EU-wide exports, headquartered in Prostějov, Czech Republic.
meta.contact: Contact HŽP a.s. in Prostějov. Phone, email, address and direct contacts for sales, technical and HR departments.
meta.career: Join the HŽP a.s. team. We offer stable employment, competitive salaries and professional development at a leading European spring manufacturer.
